# Generated by iptables-save v1.8.9 on Mon May 25 18:30:00 2026
# Edge router for a small LAN: public iface eth0 publishes a web app
# (10.0.0.10) and — risky — an SSH jumpbox (10.0.0.20:22) via DNAT.
# The lint pass should flag exposed-via-dnat on the SSH forward.
*filter
:INPUT DROP [0:0]
:FORWARD DROP [0:0]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [0:0]
-A INPUT -i lo -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -m conntrack --ctstate RELATED,ESTABLISHED -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -p icmp -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -s 192.168.10.0/24 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 22 -m comment --comment "ssh from mgmt LAN only" -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -j LOG --log-prefix "DROP-INPUT: " --log-tcp-sequence
-A INPUT -j DROP
-A FORWARD -m conntrack --ctstate RELATED,ESTABLISHED -j ACCEPT
-A FORWARD -d 10.0.0.10/32 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 80 -m comment --comment "web app (DNAT target)" -j ACCEPT
-A FORWARD -d 10.0.0.10/32 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 443 -j ACCEPT
-A FORWARD -d 10.0.0.20/32 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 22 -m comment --comment "ssh jumpbox (DNAT target)" -j ACCEPT
-A FORWARD -j LOG --log-prefix "DROP-FORWARD: "
-A FORWARD -j DROP
COMMIT
*nat
:PREROUTING ACCEPT [0:0]
:INPUT ACCEPT [0:0]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [0:0]
:POSTROUTING ACCEPT [0:0]
-A PREROUTING -i eth0 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 80 -m comment --comment "publish web app HTTP" -j DNAT --to-destination 10.0.0.10:80
-A PREROUTING -i eth0 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 443 -m comment --comment "publish web app HTTPS" -j DNAT --to-destination 10.0.0.10:443
-A PREROUTING -i eth0 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 2222 -m comment --comment "publish ssh jumpbox" -j DNAT --to-destination 10.0.0.20:22
-A POSTROUTING -s 10.0.0.0/24 -o eth0 -m comment --comment "outbound NAT" -j MASQUERADE
COMMIT
